category_sources: Official tox documentation describes tox as a command-line driven automation/testing tool.
source_facts.description says tox is a generic Python virtualenv management and test command-line tool.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use the tox name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is available as a documentation fallback.
source_facts.homepage points to the official tox documentation site.
repo_sources: The official documentation/repository metadata links tox to tox-dev/tox.
tags_sources: Official repository description identifies command-line CI frontend and development task automation.
source_facts.description identifies Python virtualenv management and test command usage.
